title: Tunisian Silky Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry dish from Tunisia, showcasing the silky texture of the sauce and the umami taste.

ingredients.name: Tunisian stir-fry spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at Middle Eastern stores or online

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms and sauté until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the diced tomato and stir-fry spice blend. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
Pour in the silky sauce and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
